changeSet.author: jos

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE email = 'demo1@jo2024.fr'

changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO users (email, password_hash, first_name, last_name, role, mfa_enabled, locale, created_date, last_modified_date) VALUES ('demo1@jo2024.fr', '$2a$12$sI8pFoEGFcxKG.VxGkHZbeVAoauyiS3O09aTXUwFbA4shnQvbpDKK', 'Alice', 'Martin', 'ROLE_USER', false, 'fr', '2024-06-15 09:00:00', '2024-06-15 09:00:00'), ('demo2@jo2024.fr', '$2a$12$sI8pFoEGFcxKG.VxGkHZbeVAoauyiS3O09aTXUwFbA4shnQvbpDKK', 'Bruno', 'Lemaire', 'ROLE_USER', false, 'fr', '2024-06-16 10:00:00', '2024-06-16 10:00:00'), ('demo3@jo2024.fr', '$2a$12$sI8pFoEGFcxKG.VxGkHZbeVAoauyiS3O09aTXUwFbA4shnQvbpDKK', 'Clara', 'Dubois', 'ROLE_USER', false, 'fr', '2024-06-17 11:00:00', '2024-06-17 11:00:00'), ('demo4@jo2024.fr', '$2a$12$sI8pFoEGFcxKG.VxGkHZbeVAoauyiS3O09aTXUwFbA4shnQvbpDKK', 'David', 'Roux', 'ROLE_USER', false, 'fr', '2024-06-18 12:00:00', '2024-06-18 12:00:00'), ('demo5@jo2024.fr', '$2a$12$sI8pFoEGFcxKG.VxGkHZbeVAoauyiS3O09aTXUwFbA4shnQvbpDKK', 'Emma', 'Bernard', 'ROLE_USER', false, 'fr', '2024-06-19 13:00:00', '2024-06-19 13:00:00');

INSERT INTO transactions (transaction_key, status, amount, payment_method, payment_reference, created_date, payed_date, user_id) VALUES ('tx-seed-001', 'COMPLETED', 40.00, 'CREDIT_CARD', 'REF-SEED0001', '2024-07-15 10:00:00', '2024-07-15 10:01:00', (SELECT id FROM users WHERE email = 'demo1@jo2024.fr')), ('tx-seed-002', 'COMPLETED', 75.00, 'CREDIT_CARD', 'REF-SEED0002', '2024-07-16 11:00:00', '2024-07-16 11:01:00', (SELECT id FROM users WHERE email = 'demo1@jo2024.fr')), ('tx-seed-003', 'COMPLETED', 135.00, 'BANK_TRANSFER', 'REF-SEED0003', '2024-07-17 14:00:00', '2024-07-17 14:02:00', (SELECT id FROM users WHERE email = 'demo2@jo2024.fr')), ('tx-seed-004', 'COMPLETED', 80.00, 'CREDIT_CARD', 'REF-SEED0004', '2024-07-18 09:30:00', '2024-07-18 09:31:00', (SELECT id FROM users WHERE email = 'demo2@jo2024.fr')), ('tx-seed-005', 'COMPLETED', 150.00, 'CREDIT_CARD', 'REF-SEED0005', '2024-07-19 16:00:00', '2024-07-19 16:01:00', (SELECT id FROM users WHERE email = 'demo3@jo2024.fr')), ('tx-seed-006', 'COMPLETED', 40.00, 'BANK_TRANSFER', 'REF-SEED0006', '2024-07-20 08:00:00', '2024-07-20 08:02:00', (SELECT id FROM users WHERE email = 'demo3@jo2024.fr')), ('tx-seed-007', 'COMPLETED', 135.00, 'CREDIT_CARD', 'REF-SEED0007', '2024-07-22 13:00:00', '2024-07-22 13:01:00', (SELECT id FROM users WHERE email = 'demo4@jo2024.fr')), ('tx-seed-008', 'COMPLETED', 40.00, 'CREDIT_CARD', 'REF-SEED0008', '2024-07-23 17:00:00', '2024-07-23 17:01:00', (SELECT id FROM users WHERE email = 'demo4@jo2024.fr')), ('tx-seed-009', 'COMPLETED', 75.00, 'BANK_TRANSFER', 'REF-SEED0009', '2024-07-25 10:00:00', '2024-07-25 10:02:00', (SELECT id FROM users WHERE email = 'demo5@jo2024.fr')), ('tx-seed-010', 'COMPLETED', 120.00, 'CREDIT_CARD', 'REF-SEED0010', '2024-07-27 15:00:00', '2024-07-27 15:01:00', (SELECT id FROM users WHERE email = 'demo5@jo2024.fr')), ('tx-seed-011', 'COMPLETED', 80.00, 'CREDIT_CARD', 'REF-SEED0011', '2024-07-29 11:00:00', '2024-07-29 11:01:00', (SELECT id FROM users WHERE email = 'demo1@jo2024.fr')), ('tx-seed-012', 'COMPLETED', 75.00, 'CREDIT_CARD', 'REF-SEED0012', '2024-08-01 19:00:00', '2024-08-01 19:01:00', (SELECT id FROM users WHERE email = 'demo3@jo2024.fr')), ('tx-seed-013', 'CANCELED', 75.00, 'CREDIT_CARD', 'REF-SEED0013', '2024-07-20 14:00:00', NULL, (SELECT id FROM users WHERE email = 'demo2@jo2024.fr')), ('tx-seed-014', 'FAILED', 40.00, 'BANK_TRANSFER', 'REF-SEED0014', '2024-07-22 11:00:00', NULL, (SELECT id FROM users WHERE email = 'demo4@jo2024.fr'));

INSERT INTO tickets (user_key, transaction_key, ticket_key, combined_key, barcode, price, is_valid, is_scanned, created_at, expiry_at, transaction_id, user_id, event_id, offer_id) VALUES ( 'usr-seed-0001', 'tx-seed-001', 'tkt-seed-0001', 'combined-seed-0001', 'JO2024-SEED0001', 40.00, true, false, '2024-07-15 10:01:00', '2024-08-04 21:30:00', (SELECT id FROM transactions WHERE transaction_key = 'tx-seed-001'), (SELECT id FROM users WHERE email = 'demo1@jo2024.fr'), (SELECT id FROM events WHERE name = '100m Hommes - Finale'), (SELECT id FROM offers WHERE name = 'Solo') );

INSERT INTO tickets (user_key, transaction_key, ticket_key, combined_key, barcode, price, is_valid, is_scanned, created_at, expiry_at, transaction_id, user_id, event_id, offer_id) VALUES ( 'usr-seed-0002', 'tx-seed-002', 'tkt-seed-0002', 'combined-seed-0002', 'JO2024-SEED0002', 37.50, true, false, '2024-07-16 11:01:00', '2024-08-09 21:00:00', (SELECT id FROM transactions WHERE transaction_key = 'tx-seed-002'), (SELECT id FROM users WHERE email = 'demo1@jo2024.fr'), (SELECT id FROM events WHERE name = 'Football Hommes - Finale'), (SELECT id FROM offers WHERE name = 'Duo') ); INSERT INTO tickets (user_key, transaction_key, ticket_key, combined_key, barcode, price, is_valid, is_scanned, created_at, expiry_at, transaction_id, user_id, event_id, offer_id) VALUES ( 'usr-seed-0003', 'tx-seed-002', 'tkt-seed-0003', 'combined-seed-0003', 'JO2024-SEED0003', 37.50, true, false, '2024-07-16 11:01:00', '2024-08-09 21:00:00', (SELECT id FROM transactions WHERE transaction_key = 'tx-seed-002'), (SELECT id FROM users WHERE email = 'demo1@jo2024.fr'), (SELECT id FROM events WHERE name = 'Football Hommes - Finale'), (SELECT id FROM offers WHERE name = 'Duo') );
